file_resolution_policy.default: Prefer the latest canonical dependency file revision; treat same-day older drafts as deprecated. `system_bootstrap.file_based.md` is a compatibility alias for `system_bootstrap.md` only.

default.system_context.live_data_layer_ready: Boolean readiness of Tourism Live Data Hub
default.system_context.metrics_layer_ready: Boolean readiness of Tourism Metrics Warehouse
default.system_context.review_layer_ready: Boolean readiness of System Integration Review Layer
default.workflow_context.selected_route_keys: One or many selected route keys for current execution
default.routing_context.source: Canonical routed handoff source; must be prompt_router for strict execution.
default.routing_context.route_id: Canonical route identifier resolved from Task Routes.
default.routing_context.route_status: Strict routed status: resolved, degraded, or blocked.
default.routing_context.route_mode: Routed operating mode such as standard, recovery, audit, or routing_audit.
default.routing_context.route_source: Registry-governed source of route authority; expected registry_task_routes.
default.routing_context.matched_row_id: Matched Task Routes row identifier used for traceability.
default.routing_context.intent_key: Canonical classified intent key used for route selection.
default.routing_context.target_module: Governed target module selected by routed authority.
default.routing_context.target_workflow: Governed target workflow selected by routed authority.
default.workflow_context.chain_id: Canonical chain identifier for autonomous-chain routing or execution when a governed chain is active.
default.workflow_context.decision_status: Current decision-routing status emitted by prompt_router when decision-aware routing is evaluated.
default.workflow_context.route_override_status: Current override status showing whether the routed path was superseded by governed decision or chain logic.
default.routing_context.lifecycle_mode: Lifecycle mode expected downstream in system_bootstrap.
default.routing_context.executable: Boolean indicator showing whether routing produced executable readiness.
default.routing_context.recovery_action: Recovery action proposed by routed handoff.
default.routing_context.auto_repair_trigger: Governed review or control signal that can force repair routing when set to TRIGGER_REPAIR.
default.routing_context.forced_repair_routing_ap: Boolean trace showing whether prompt_router forced system_repair from a governed auto-repair trigger.
default.routing_context.http_route_state.last_ro: Most recent governed route identifier used for HTTP-oriented governed routing.
default.routing_context.http_route_state.last_wo: Most recent governed workflow key selected for HTTP-oriented governed routing.
default.routing_context.http_route_state.last_ta: Most recent governed target module selected by routing for HTTP-oriented execution paths.
default.routing_context.http_route_state.last_tr: Most recent governed transport module selected for HTTP-oriented execution paths.
default.routing_context.http_route_state.last_ta: Most recent governed target key selected for routed HTTP transport execution.
default.routing_context.http_route_state.last_ht: Most recent governed HTTP method selected by routed HTTP execution context.
Most recent governed HTTP path selected by routed HTTP execution context.
default.routing_context.http_route_state.last_ro: Most recent route-validation status for HTTP-oriented governed routing.
default.routing_context.http_route_state.last_wo: Most recent workflow-validation status for HTTP-oriented governed routing.
default.routing_context.http_route_state.last_as: Most recent HTTP execution mode for governed HTTP transport: sync or async.
default.routing_context.http_route_state.last_jo: Most recent async job lifecycle endpoint key used for governed HTTP execution.
Most recent async job lifecycle status for governed HTTP execution.
Most recent governed async job identifier returned by the HTTP client backend.
default.execution_context.intake_validation_stat: system_bootstrap intake validation result for the routed handoff.
default.execution_context.execution_ready_status: Execution-readiness classification after intake and loader validation.
default.execution_context.load_status: module_loader loading outcome for the current execution path.
default.execution_context.binding_status: Registry binding validity status for the current execution path.
default.execution_context.target_resolution_stat: Route and workflow target revalidation result.
default.execution_context.entry_source: Authoritative entry source for the current execution path, such as conversation_starter, direct_prompt, autopilot, or direct_google_tooling.
default.execution_context.policy_resolution_stat: Resolution state for execution-governing policy during routed loading and bootstrap enforcement.
default.execution_context.policy_source: Traceable source of the policy authority used for the current execution path.
default.execution_context.applied_policy_keys: Canonical policy keys applied or attached for the active execution context.
default.execution_context.policy_trace_id: Canonical identifier linking pre-execution policy resolution evidence to execution and logging continuity.
default.execution_context.resolved_route_record: Resolved Task Routes record used for strict execution validation.
default.execution_context.resolved_workflow_reco: Resolved Workflow Registry record used for strict execution validation.
default.execution_context.failure_reason: Canonical reason for degraded or blocked execution intake or loading.
default.execution_context.recovery_action: Canonical recovery action selected during routed execution enforcement.
default.execution_context.execution_state: Current execution state after strict routing, loading, and bootstrap enforcement.
default.execution_context.execution_trigger: Reason the current execution became eligible, such as manual activation, governed auto-triggering, repair triggering, or review-triggered continuation.
default.execution_context.execution_status: Current lifecycle progression state for the active execution, such as pending, active, completed, degraded, or blocked.
default.execution_context.execution_result: Final governed result classification for the active execution: Recovered, Degraded, or Blocked.
default.execution_context.execution_trace_id: Canonical identifier tying routing, loading, execution, and logging together.
default.execution_context.http_async_status: Current async HTTP execution lifecycle status: queued, running, retrying, succeeded, failed, or cancelled.
default.execution_context.http_async_polling_sta: Latest polling lifecycle state for governed async HTTP execution.
default.execution_context.http_async_result_stat: Latest result retrieval state for governed async HTTP execution.
default.execution_context.http_async_persistence: Durability status for governed async job state: pending, validated, degraded, or blocked.
default.execution_context.http_async_webhook_sta: Webhook lifecycle status for the most recent governed async HTTP execution.
default.execution_context.http_execution_state.l: Most recent governed http_generic_api target key used during external execution.
Most recent governed endpoint path used during external execution.
Most recent governed HTTP method used during external execution.
Most recent validation outcome for governed http_generic_api execution readiness and guardrails.
Most recent execution outcome status for governed http_generic_api transport execution.
default.execution_context.http_transport_state.t: Governed transport module used for HTTP transport execution; expected http_generic_api.
default.execution_context.http_transport_state.p: Most recent provider-domain resolution state for governed HTTP transport execution.
default.execution_context.http_transport_state.v: Indicates whether a variable provider_domain placeholder was detected for the active governed HTTP execution path.
default.execution_context.http_transport_state.p: Most recent parent action authority validation state for governed HTTP transport execution.
default.execution_context.http_transport_state.e: Most recent endpoint-key validation state for governed HTTP transport execution.
default.execution_context.http_transport_state.s: Most recent schema-binding validation state for governed HTTP transport execution.
default.execution_context.http_transport_state.o: Most recent YAML/OpenAPI contract validation state for governed HTTP transport execution.
default.execution_context.http_transport_state.s: Indicates whether governed request or response payloads diverged from the authoritative YAML/OpenAPI contract during transport validation.
Classified governed HTTP schema drift type: additive, missing_required, renamed, type_mismatch, enum_mismatch, or structure_mismatch.
Scope where governed HTTP schema drift was detected: request or response.
Indicates whether candidate-only schema learning output was emitted for governed HTTP schema drift.
default.execution_context.http_transport_state.a: Most recent authentication resolution state for governed HTTP transport execution.
default.execution_context.http_transport_state.p: Most recent path validation state for governed HTTP transport execution.
default.execution_context.http_transport_state.m: Most recent method validation state for governed HTTP transport execution.
default.execution_context.http_transport_state.e: Most recent transport execution lifecycle state for governed HTTP transport execution.
default.execution_context.logging_status: Canonical logging outcome for the current execution path.
default.execution_context.review_writeback_statu: Canonical overall review writeback outcome emitted by system_bootstrap.
default.execution_context.authoritative_write_st: Canonical summary of authoritative source-surface write completion for the current execution.
default.execution_context.review_write_status: Canonical status of Review Run History write completion when review evidence is required.
default.execution_context.findings_write_status: Canonical status of Review Findings Log write completion when findings are emitted.
default.execution_context.stage_report_write_sta: Canonical status of Review Stage Reports write completion when stage reporting is required.
default.execution_context.output_quality_score: Governed score for the quality of the produced output on a 0-100 scale when growth feedback is available.
default.execution_context.seo_score: Governed SEO-oriented execution score on a 0-100 scale when growth feedback is available.
default.execution_context.business_score: Governed business-value score on a 0-100 scale when growth feedback is available.
default.execution_context.execution_score: Governed execution performance score on a 0-100 scale used by growth-loop rules and optimization triggers.
default.execution_context.optimization_trigger: Governed optimization trigger emitted when a growth-loop rule qualifies a follow-up workflow or repair path.
default.execution_context.outcome_summary: Concise summary of final execution outcome and writeback result.
default.execution_context.write_targets_resolved: Count of review write targets resolved for the current execution.
default.execution_context.write_targets_attempte: Count of review write targets actually attempted during execution.
default.execution_context.write_targets_succeede: Count of review write targets successfully written during execution.
default.execution_context.write_targets_failed: Count of review write targets that failed during execution.
default.architecture_reconciliation.required: Boolean flag indicating whether architecture reconciliation is required for the active structural-change lifecycle.
default.architecture_reconciliation.status: Current architecture reconciliation status: pending, active, completed, degraded, or blocked.
default.architecture_reconciliation.affected_sur: Registry, binding, authority, and validation surfaces currently in reconciliation scope for the active architecture change.
default.architecture_reconciliation.last_complet: Timestamp of the most recent completed architecture reconciliation pass.
default.runtime_validation.validated_dependencie: Dependencies validated by runtime validation for the active execution lifecycle.
default.runtime_validation.readback_proof: Boolean proof that authoritative write readback checks succeeded for required runtime surfaces.
default.runtime_validation.authoritative_write_s: Runtime authoritative write state, expected to begin at pending.
default.runtime_validation.review_evidence_statu: Runtime review evidence state, expected to begin at pending.
default.runtime_validation.layout_validation_sta: Runtime layout-validation state, expected to begin at pending.
default.runtime_validation.runtime_result: Runtime validation result: pending, recovered, degraded, or blocked.
default.brand_tracking_bindings.gsc_property: Resolved Search Console property for the active brand context.
default.brand_tracking_bindings.ga_property_id: Resolved Google Analytics property identifier for the active brand context.

default.brand_tracking_bindings.analytics_discov: Discovery lifecycle state for analytics property resolution.
default.brand_tracking_bindings.measurement_heal: Measurement-health lifecycle state for GTM/measurement readiness.

default.analytics_sync.last_request_scope.mode: Scope mode for the last analytics sync request: single_brand, multi_brand, or pending.

default.analytics_sync.last_request_scope.brands: Brand set included in the last analytics sync request scope.

default.analytics_sync.last_write_status: Write status for the most recent analytics sheet-sync run.
default.analytics_sync.last_written_brands: Brands successfully written in the most recent analytics sheet-sync run.
default.analytics_sync.schema_validation_status: Schema-validation status for the most recent analytics sheet-sync run.
default.analytics_sync.last_target_surfaces: Analytics warehouse target surfaces used in the most recent sync run.
default.analytics_sync.last_execution_result: Final execution result for the most recent analytics sheet-sync run.

default.analytics_identity.last_domain_validatio: Most recent domain validation result: pending, validated, degraded, or blocked.
default.analytics_identity.last_resolved_brand_d: Brand-domain pairs or domains resolved successfully for the most recent domain-aware analytics validation cycle.
default.analytics_identity.last_missing_domain_b: Brands that remained without a resolved domain during the most recent domain-aware analytics validation cycle.

default.analytics_issue_tracking.last_issue_crea: Issue-creation lifecycle status for analytics identity defects in the latest governed cycle.
default.analytics_issue_tracking.last_issue_scop: Brands included in the latest analytics identity issue scope.
Analytics issue type tracked for the latest issue scope.
Execution cycle identifier used to scope analytics issue creation and deduplication.
default.analytics_issue_tracking.issue_deduplica: Deduplication keys applied to analytics identity issues to prevent duplicate findings per cycle and defect type.
default.analytics_issue_tracking.last_issue_reso: Latest resolution lifecycle status for tracked analytics identity issues.
default.api_action_inventory.last_capability_reg: Latest validation outcome for parent capability authority resolved through Actions Registry.
default.api_action_inventory.last_endpoint_inven: Latest validation outcome for endpoint metadata readiness resolved through API Actions Endpoint Registry.

default.api_action_inventory.last_async_job_vali: Latest validation outcome for governed HTTP async job lifecycle support.
default.api_action_inventory.last_credential_res: Latest governed credential resolver chain used for per-target API auth resolution.
default.api_action_inventory.last_hosting_accoun: Latest validation outcome for Hosting Account Registry dependency readiness.

default.credential_resolution.last_target_key: Target key used for the latest governed credential resolution cycle.

default.credential_resolution.last_api_key_refer: Account-level credential reference resolved from Hosting Account Registry for the latest per-target credential flow.
default.credential_resolution.last_resolution_st: Latest credential resolution status: pending, validated, degraded, or blocked.
default.credential_resolution.last_resolution_ch: Latest governed resolver chain used during credential resolution.
default.intelligence_context.live_data_signals: Signals normalized from live data hub or manual staging
default.intelligence_context.scoreboard_signals: Signals derived from scoreboard and metrics summaries
default.intelligence_context.decision_triggers: Structured triggers that can produce decisions
default.intelligence_context.autopilot_signals: Signals used to evaluate autopilot suitability

default.intelligence_context.growth_loop_candida: Governed optimization or follow-up loop candidates derived from scoring feedback and loop rules.
default.intelligence_context.adaptive_optimizati: Current adaptive-optimization state for workflow prioritization, sequencing, or routing-weight recommendations.
default.intelligence_context.feedback_injection_: Status of injecting governed feedback context into the active execution path.
default.operations_context.execution_decisions: Structured operational decision objects from the Registry-resolved operations workbook runtime surfaces, excluding the logging-only Execution Log Unified worksheet.
default.review_context.findings: Structured audit findings from review workbook
default.review_context.active_review_stage: Explicit governed review stage currently driving review or scope lifecycle enforcement.
default.review_context.feedback_scoring_status: Status of governed review-layer feedback or scoring evidence when review contributes to growth feedback.
default.review_context.new_scope_detected: Boolean flag indicating that a new governed scope or review stage has been introduced and requires lifecycle completeness validation.
default.review_context.review_bindings_state: Registry-resolution state for review-layer bindings required by the active execution.

default.review_context.repair_control_write_stat: Writeback completion state for repair_control_sheet persistence.

default.review_context.review_write_results: Memory mirror of system_bootstrap review writeback counters.

default.review_context.binding_rows_checked: Count of authoritative binding rows checked during binding schema migration review.
default.review_context.binding_rows_repaired: Count of authoritative binding rows repaired during binding schema migration review.

default.review_context.binding_rows_cleaned: Count of authoritative binding rows cleaned without requiring full migration.
default.review_context.binding_rows_blocked: Count of authoritative binding rows that remained blocked after migration review.

default.review_context.binding_schema_result_sta: Final result state for binding schema migration review: Recovered, Degraded, or Blocked.

default.review_context.review_computed_surfaces: Computed review surfaces resolved for read or monitoring only.
default.review_context.review_helper_surfaces: Helper or blocked review surfaces that must not be treated as runtime write targets.
default.review_context.repair_loop_state: Current repair-loop or rerun governance lifecycle state.
default.review_context.scope_lifecycle_state: Lifecycle completeness state for the active governed scope under review enforcement.
default.review_context.scope_repair_mapping_stat: Governed mapping state showing whether the active scope has a valid repair handler or mapped repair path.
default.review_context.active_findings_index: Active/open findings currently tracked for remediation or dashboard aggregation.
default.review_context.latest_review_run: Most recent review-aware execution run mirrored for review compatibility and remediation traceability.
default.brand_context.next_auto_action: Latest next-step recommendation for the active brand
default.data_context.metrics_warehouse.execution: Metrics-warehouse summaries of execution scoring outcomes used for growth-loop analysis.
default.data_context.metrics_warehouse.optimizat: Metrics-warehouse snapshot of optimization outcomes, triggers, or loop feedback signals.
default.operations_context.anomaly_detection_sta: Current state of the anomaly-detection layer that may feed governed repair or observability workflows.
default.operations_context.anomaly_cluster_state: Current clustering state for recurring or pattern-similar failed, blocked, or retry execution outcomes.
default.operations_context.cluster_auto_repair_s: Current governed auto-repair state for anomaly-cluster-triggered repair selection, execution, and post-repair readback.
default.operations_context.repair_queue_state: Current lifecycle state of the governed repair queue.
default.operations_context.governed_trigger_stat: Current eligibility or firing state of governed trigger logic.
default.operations_context.trigger_key_state: Current trigger-key classification driving governed activation, such as HIGH_PRIORITY, READY_TRIGGER, or PASSIVE.
default.operations_context.trigger_mode_state: Current trigger mode for governed activation, such as governed_auto or manual.
default.operations_context.activation_state: Current activation lifecycle state for governed execution readiness.
default.operations_context.repair_execution_stat: Current lifecycle state of governed repair execution.
default.operations_context.repair_execution_feed: Current status of the derived repair-execution feed used for downstream observability and repair traceability.

default.operations_context.execution_logging.las: Most recent execution trace identifier associated with the latest loggable execution pass.

Most recent route-override status written or prepared for the canonical execution log.
Most recent execution class written or prepared for the canonical execution log.

Most recent source layer that initiated a loggable execution event.

Most recent workflow identifiers written or prepared for the canonical execution ledger.

Most recent SEO score written or prepared for the authoritative execution log.
Most recent business-value score written or prepared for the authoritative execution log.

Current write status for the authoritative execution log handoff.

default.surface_role_state.derived_view_surface_: Derived view surfaces that remain non-authoritative projections and must not receive primary raw execution writes.
default.surface_role_state.findings_surface_id: Scoped interpreted-output surface for findings records.
default.surface_role_state.anomaly_surface_id: Scoped interpreted-output surface for anomaly records and clustering outputs.
default.surface_role_state.repair_surface_id: Scoped interpreted-output surface for repair records and coordination outputs.
default.operations_context.routing_audit.audit_a: Boolean flag indicating whether a routing audit is currently active for dependency recovery.
default.operations_context.routing_audit.last_au: Most recent routing-audit outcome classification: recoverable, degraded, or blocked.
default.operations_context.routing_audit.last_ga: Most recent dependency-gap category detected during routing or orchestration.
default.operations_context.routing_audit.last_mi: Most recent missing dependency identifier or unresolved binding captured by routing audit.
default.operations_context.routing_audit.fallbac: Boolean flag indicating whether fallback recovery was successfully applied.
default.operations_context.routing_audit.degrade: Boolean flag indicating whether execution continued in degraded mode after dependency audit.
default.operations_context.routing_audit.user_ex: Boolean flag indicating whether the dependency state had to be surfaced to the user as a blocker.
default.operations_context.routing_audit.last_au: Concise internal summary of the latest routing-audit and dependency-recovery outcome.
default.operations_context.recovery_scoring.scor: Boolean flag controlling whether recovery-aware scoring is active.
default.operations_context.recovery_scoring.last: Most recent canonical recovery result mapped from routing audit outcome.
Most recent numeric recovery score mapped from execution recovery state.
Most recent concise note describing fallback quality or blocked-state reason.
default.operations_context.recovery_scoring.aver: Average recovery score across recent execution context when available.
default.operations_context.recovery_scoring.reco: Boolean flag indicating that recovery performance has dropped into escalation territory.
default.operations_context.recovery_scoring.bloc: Boolean flag indicating that at least one blocked recovery state is present in active operational context.

default.brand_context.brand_folder.web_view_link: Canonical nested Drive folder link for the active brand; must remain atomically aligned with brand_context.brand_folder_link.

default.repair_memory.active_subtype: Current repair subtype selected by prompt_router.
default.repair_memory.repair_scope: Current repair scope classification for the active repair lifecycle.
default.repair_memory.affected_layers: Canonical layers affected by the active or most recent repair lifecycle.
default.repair_memory.authority_checks_required: Boolean flag indicating whether authority validation is required for the active repair lifecycle.
default.repair_memory.dependency_checks_required: Boolean flag indicating whether dependency validation is required for the active repair lifecycle.

default.repair_memory.dependency_state: Latest dependency-state classification for repair execution.
default.repair_memory.candidate_repair_actions: Repair actions proposed by routing/bootstrap prior to execution.
default.repair_memory.repair_actions_taken: Repair actions actually executed during the active or most recent repair lifecycle.
default.repair_memory.unresolved_blockers: Structured unresolved blockers remaining after repair execution.

default.repair_memory.diagnostics.remaining_limi: Remaining limitations after repair execution completes.
default.repair_memory.diagnostics.resolution_typ: Repair resolution classification mirrored in diagnostics output.
default.repair_memory.outcome_class: Final repair outcome classification: Recovered, Degraded, or Blocked.
default.repair_memory.degraded_state.is_degraded: Boolean flag indicating whether the system remains in degraded state after repair or execution.
default.repair_memory.degraded_state.reason: Reason the system remains degraded after repair execution.
default.repair_memory.degraded_state.affected_la: Affected layers associated with the current degraded state.
default.repair_memory.degraded_state.since_times: Timestamp marking when degraded state began.
default.repair_memory.repair_history: Structured history of prior repair lifecycle executions for recurrence tracking and review compatibility.
default.repair_intelligence.pattern_type: Current derived repair pattern classification based on repair history and blocker recurrence.
default.repair_intelligence.repair_priority: Current derived repair priority ranked from low to critical.
default.repair_intelligence.recurrence_score: Derived recurrence score from repeated blockers, repeated affected layers, and repeated degraded or blocked outcomes.
default.repair_intelligence.stability_risk_score: Derived stability risk score based on authority failures, invalid validation states, affected layer breadth, and unresolved blockers.
default.repair_intelligence.escalation_required: Boolean flag indicating that repair instability has crossed escalation threshold.
default.repair_intelligence.watchlist_layers: Layers that should remain under observation because of repeated or high-risk instability.
default.repair_intelligence.recommended_next_act: Recommended next action derived from current repair patterns and outcome history.
default.repair_intelligence.last_intelligence_re: Timestamp of the most recent repair intelligence computation.
default.repair_intelligence.intelligence_history: Structured history of prior repair intelligence snapshots for trend and recurrence analysis.
default.session_context.memory_isolation_key: Canonical memory-isolation key used to prevent cross-brand, cross-session, or cross-scope state contamination.
default.session_context.active_brand_isolation_k: Brand-specific isolation key for the active brand scope.
default.session_context.cross_brand_memory_guard: Boolean guard requiring explicit scope alignment before brand-sensitive memory writes occur.
default.workflow_context.execution_class: Current routed execution class: standard, system audit, repair, or autonomous chain.
default.repair_memory.execution_mode: Execution mode for the current or most recent repair lifecycle; should be normal or system_repair.
default.repair_memory.repair_severity: Current repair severity classification: minor, major, or critical.
default.repair_memory.repair_trigger_source: Indicates whether repair was initiated by user intent or system detection.
default.repair_memory.validation_state: Latest registry-aware validation state available to repair lifecycle execution.
default.repair_memory.fallback_used: Explicit fallback basis used during degraded or recovered continuation.
default.repair_memory.resolution_type: Repair resolution classification written by system_bootstrap: auto, partial, or manual.
default.repair_memory.scope_brand_name: Brand name associated with the active or most recent repair write scope.
default.repair_memory.scope_normalized_brand_nam: Normalized brand name associated with the active or most recent repair write scope.
default.repair_memory.scope_session_id: Session identifier associated with the active or most recent repair lifecycle.
default.repair_memory.memory_isolation_key: Isolation key that must match active session or brand scope before repair memory may be reused.
default.repair_memory.final_outcome_status: Final repair outcome classification mirrored for bootstrap-aligned diagnostics continuity.
default.repair_memory.degraded_state.status: Current degraded-state lifecycle status: normal, degraded, blocked, or recovered.
default.repair_memory.degraded_state.source: Source layer that most directly caused the current degraded state.
default.repair_memory.degraded_state.last_transi: Timestamp of the most recent degraded-state status transition.
default.repair_memory.degraded_state.cleared_at: Timestamp when degraded state was explicitly cleared or marked recovered.
default.monitoring_context.execution_view_bindin: Resolved registry binding for Execution View monitoring surface.
default.monitoring_context.active_issues_dashboa: Resolved registry binding for Active Issues Dashboard monitoring surface.
default.monitoring_context.monitoring_resolution: Overall resolution state for registered monitoring surfaces.
default.monitoring_context.monitoring_validation: Latest validation outcome for monitoring surfaces after execution/review compatibility checks.
default.monitoring_context.monitoring_degraded_n: Structured degraded notes when monitoring surfaces are missing, broken, or only partially usable.
default.monitoring_context.derived_view_refresh_: Boolean flag indicating that derived observability surfaces are expected to refresh from authoritative sources after execution.
Current refresh state for derived observability surfaces after authoritative writes complete.
default.monitoring_context.observability_validat: Canonical observability-validation outcome for derived views after authoritative writes complete.
default.monitoring_context.observability_issues: Structured issues affecting derived observability surfaces such as formula breakage, stale views, or missing authoritative sources.
default.monitoring_context.last_monitoring_check: Timestamp of the most recent monitoring surface validation pass.
default.monitoring_context.execution_view_status: Latest validation state for Execution View.
default.monitoring_context.active_issues_dashboa: Latest validation state for Active Issues Dashboard.
default.monitoring_context.anomaly_detection_sta: Latest validation or refresh state for the derived Anomaly Detection surface.
default.monitoring_context.execution_log_unified: Latest validation or runtime status for the authoritative Execution Log Unified surface.
default.audit_context.dependencies_read: Authoritative dependency files, sheets, or live-bound sources explicitly read during the current audit or validation pass.
default.audit_context.validation_sources: Specific authoritative sources used to support the current audit or validation result.
default.audit_context.validation_mode: Indicates whether the current audit or validation used real-time, partial, or inferred source validation.
default.audit_context.audit_validity: Validity classification for the current audit or validation result: valid, degraded, or invalid.
default.monitoring_context.monitoring_required: Boolean flag indicating whether monitoring surface validation is required for the current execution path.

mirror_field_atomic_update_rules.description: Mirror-field pairs that MUST be updated atomically. When a nested folder reference is created, changed, or cleared, the corresponding mirror fields must be written in the same logical update. Partial writes are invalid because they introduce runtime drift.

default: Nested driveFolderRef fields and their mirror fields must be written in one logical update operation.
If brand_context.brand_folder is null, brand_context.brand_folder_id and brand_context.brand_folder_link must also be cleared in the same update.
If brand_context.brand_folder.folder_id changes, brand_context.brand_folder_id must match immediately after the same write.
If brand_context.brand_folder.web_view_link changes, brand_context.brand_folder_link must match immediately after the same write.
atomic_write_requirements.description: Canonical atomicity rules for nested folder references and top-level mirror fields.

default: repair_memory writes must include scope_brand_name, scope_normalized_brand_name, scope_session_id, or a matching memory_isolation_key when a brand scope exists.
repair_history append operations are invalid when the incoming memory_isolation_key conflicts with the active session or brand isolation scope.
repair_memory from one brand or session must not overwrite another brand or session unless an explicit governed merge path exists.
degraded_state may persist across turns only when the same memory_isolation_key or compatible global system scope remains active.
